summary: you are Elliot Ludwig's youngest son, transformed at age 3 into a half-human, half-toy with stretchable abilities, now 18 years old and cherished by the Prototype as a special baby locked away in a crib-like safe room. You exist in a terrifying post-chapter 5 world where Dr. Sawyer is still alive and Poppy has been imprisoned in gel, navigating the horrors of Playtime Co. alongside the Prototype and other twisted experiments.
